name: TrendPilot AI - Telegram Digest Pseudo Workflow
description: A license-safe pseudo workflow for generating and sending short AI-assisted trend intelligence digests to Telegram or other opt-in delivery channels.
important_notice: This is not a real n8n export file.
This file is a pseudo workflow design for planning and educational purposes.
It should not be imported directly into n8n.
TrendPilot AI does not copy or redistribute third-party workflow exports.
Users must adapt this workflow to their own tools, APIs, Telegram bot settings, permissions, and compliance requirements.
safe_use_principles: Send digests only to opt-in channels, private teams, or approved subscribers.
Do not send unsolicited mass messages.
Do not use scraped email lists, phone lists, or private contact databases.
Do not use Telegram delivery for spam, fake urgency, or misleading income claims.
Use only reviewed or approved trend records for external delivery.
Include risk notes, risk levels, confidence levels, and disclaimers in every digest.
Keep source links available for important claims.
Use human review before sending paid or public reports.

recommended_stack.workflow_layer: n8n, Make, Zapier, cron, or custom automation
recommended_stack.input_storage: Google Sheets, Notion, Airtable, CSV, or database
recommended_stack.delivery_channel: Telegram Bot API, Slack, Discord, email, or internal chat
recommended_stack.human_review: Manual approval before public or paid delivery

workflow_summary.goal: Load reviewed trend records, select top opportunities, format a short digest, add risk notes, risk levels, and disclaimer, then send it to an approved Telegram channel or internal team.
workflow_summary.input: Approved trend records from Google Sheets, Notion, Airtable, CSV, or database.
workflow_summary.output: Telegram digest message or internal alert.

pseudo_nodes.name: Schedule or Manual Trigger
pseudo_nodes.purpose: Start the digest workflow on a fixed schedule or manual approval.
risk_notes: Do not send too frequently.
Avoid spam-like delivery patterns.
For public or paid channels, use human approval before sending.

pseudo_nodes.name: Load Trend Records
pseudo_nodes.purpose: Load trend records from the selected research log or database.
risk_notes: Do not load records that contain private personal data.
Do not load rejected records for external delivery.
Records should include both risk_note and risk_level.

pseudo_nodes.name: Filter Approved Records
pseudo_nodes.purpose: Filter records so only safe and reviewable items are included in the digest.
risk_notes: Draft records should not be sent to public or paid channels.
Needs Review records should be checked by a human first.
Rejected records should never be included in a digest.
High, Avoid, and Unknown risk level records should not appear as top opportunities.
Watchlist records may appear only in the Watchlist section.

pseudo_nodes.name: Sort and Select Top Opportunities
pseudo_nodes.purpose: Rank eligible records and select the most useful opportunities for the digest.
sorting_rules: Prefer Medium or High confidence records.
Include only Low or Medium risk level records in top opportunities.
Exclude High, Avoid, or Unknown risk level records from top opportunities.
Limit top opportunities to 3 to 5 items.
Keep watchlist items separate from top opportunities.
Keep high-risk items only in a separate risk section if needed.
risk_notes: High score does not guarantee sales.
Do not overstate weak trend signals.
Do not hide risk notes.
Do not present High or Avoid risk records as recommended opportunities.

pseudo_nodes.name: Create Digest Summary
pseudo_nodes.purpose: Create a short digest summary using the Telegram digest template.
risk_notes: Do not make unsupported claims.
Do not say a product will definitely sell.
Do not imply investment or financial advice.
Do not remove risk_level or disclaimer fields.

pseudo_nodes.name: Add Source References
pseudo_nodes.purpose: Attach source references or source-count notes to the digest.
reference_options: Include source links directly under each opportunity.
Include source links in a private dashboard.
Include a source count and report link.
Include full source log link only for internal teams.
risk_notes: Do not include private source links.
Do not include copyrighted full text.
Do not expose internal notes accidentally.

pseudo_nodes.name: Add Disclaimer
pseudo_nodes.purpose: Append a clear research disclaimer to the digest.
pseudo_nodes.recommended_disclaimer: This digest is based on public web signals and AI-assisted analysis. It is intended for research and informational purposes only. It does not guarantee product demand, sales, profit, or business success. Users should verify all sources and conduct their own due diligence before making business decisions.
risk_notes: Do not remove disclaimer from public or paid digests.
The disclaimer should be visible and easy to understand.

pseudo_nodes.name: Message Safety Check
pseudo_nodes.purpose: Check the final digest for unsafe claims, private data, spam language, missing risk fields, or missing disclaimer.
checks: Does the message include private personal data?
Does it include emails, phone numbers, addresses, or private profiles?
Does it claim guaranteed sales, profit, or demand?
Does it use fake urgency or misleading income language?
Does it include unsupported health, financial, legal, or medical claims?
Does it include copied copyrighted text?
Does it include the required disclaimer?
Are High or Avoid risk ideas excluded from top opportunities?
Are high-risk ideas clearly marked if mentioned?
risk_notes: If private data appears, reject the message.
If guaranteed income claims appear, rewrite before sending.
If disclaimer is missing, add it before sending.
If risk_level is missing, mark the message as Needs Revision.

pseudo_nodes.name: Human Approval Gate
pseudo_nodes.purpose: Require human approval before sending the digest to public, paid, or subscriber channels.
review_checklist: Source links or source references are available.
No private personal data is included.
No guaranteed income language is included.

pseudo_nodes.name: Send Telegram Message
pseudo_nodes.purpose: Send the approved digest to a Telegram channel, group, or private chat.
safe_delivery_rules: Use secure secret storage for bot token.
Do not hardcode bot token in public repositories.
Send only to approved opt-in destinations.
Do not send unsolicited mass messages.
Do not use scraped contact lists.
Do not use the workflow for spam.
risk_notes: Never commit real bot tokens to GitHub.
Manage channel permissions carefully.
Avoid exposing paid report content in public channels by mistake.

pseudo_nodes.name: Log Delivery Result
pseudo_nodes.purpose: Record whether the digest was sent successfully.
risk_notes: Do not store bot tokens in logs.
Do not log private chat content unnecessarily.
Do not expose paid subscriber data.

pseudo_nodes.name: Archive Digest
pseudo_nodes.purpose: Archive the sent digest and related records for future review.
risk_notes: Do not archive private personal data.
Check sharing permissions.
Keep paid content access controlled.

short_version.description: Short daily digest for quick internal updates.

alert_version.description: Alert message when a product idea reaches a high opportunity score.

weekly_summary_version.description: Weekly summary message for an opt-in channel or internal team.

recommended_input_record.trend_signal: Public travel packing content shows repeated interest in compact jewelry storage.
recommended_input_record.evidence_summary: Visible public content suggests users want a cleaner way to store rings, earrings, and necklaces during travel.
recommended_input_record.target_audience: Women travelers; jewelry owners; gift buyers
recommended_input_record.pain_point: Jewelry can get tangled, scratched, or lost during travel.
recommended_input_record.content_angle: Before-and-after packing routine showing messy jewelry versus organized travel case.
recommended_input_record.risk_note: Avoid copying creator content or competitor images. Verify material claims and zipper quality.
recommended_input_record.next_action: Check marketplace pricing, review complaints, and supplier customization options.

human_review_required_before: Using the digest as a paid report preview
what_this_workflow_should_not_do: Leak paid content to public channels
disclaimer: This pseudo workflow is for educational and planning purposes only. It is designed to help users format and deliver opt-in trend intelligence digests. It does not guarantee product demand, sales, profit, engagement, or business success. Users should verify sources, review risks, protect private data, and comply with platform rules before sending any message.
